steps.title: Find the clause verb
steps.content: The blank is in a noun clause introduced by how: how his barbershop ___ as a political hub. That clause needs a finite verb to serve as its predicate.

steps.title: Use the finite past form
steps.content: A is a present participle, B is a perfect participial phrase, and D is an infinitive. None can be the only verb of the clause. The remaining choice is the finite past-tense verb that completes the clause. The answer is C.
